theme_and_archetype.reasoning: A high-end tech gadget e-commerce site needs an authoritative, modern, and high-contrast look to make the products pop. Dark mode emphasizes luxury and reduces eye strain, perfectly matching the provided #1A1A2E background and #0066FF primary blue.

rules: Use #1A1A2E as the absolute foundation for dark mode. Do not use pure black (#000000).
Use #0066FF strategically for primary CTAs (Add to Cart, Buy Now, Primary Buttons).
Ensure all text on dark backgrounds meets a 4.5:1 contrast ratio.
Hover states must be a lighter hue of the active state color.

headings.rules: Never use Inter for headings. Keep headings expressive and bold. H1 maxes at text-6xl.

body.rules: Use for dense content, specifications, and descriptions. Maintain generous line height (leading-relaxed).

cards_products.dark_classes: bg-[#252542] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300
cards_products.light_classes: bg-white border border-black/5 rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-[#0066FF] text-white hover:bg-[#3385FF] rounded-full font-semibold transition-all duration-200 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,102,255,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(0,102,255,0.6)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0066FF] text-[#0066FF] hover:bg-[#0066FF]/10 rounded-full font-semibold transition-all duration-200

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid (Tetris Mode) for featured products and categories. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 with wide gaps (gap-8).
layout_and_spacing.containers: Use max-w-7xl mx-auto with px-6 or px-8 for standard sections.
layout_and_spacing.section_spacing: py-24 or py-32 for major sections to allow content to breathe.
layout_and_spacing.image_constraints: Mobile images must not exceed max-h-[80vh].

components_strategy.navigation: Sticky nav with crystal glass effect. Must contain Logo, Links, Theme Toggle, Cart Icon, and Profile Icon. Never hide all links in a hamburger on desktop.
components_strategy.product_catalog: Cardless or subtle rectangular grids. Filters on the left (desktop) or in a slide-out drawer (mobile).
components_strategy.product_detail: Immersive image gallery taking up 50% of viewport width on desktop. Sticky 'Add to Cart' bar on mobile.
components_strategy.cart: Slide-out sheet (Shadcn Sheet) with real-time quantity updates and promo code input.
components_strategy.chatbot: Floating AI Chatbot orb in bottom-right corner. Use glowing animations.
rules: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, toggles, cart items).
Use Shadcn primitives for logic (Dialog, Select, Tabs, Accordion) but customize heavily to match the #1A1A2E and #0066FF aesthetic.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons, cards, and links MUST have explicit hover states (color, transform, or shadow changes).
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Staggered fade-in-up for product grids using Framer Motion.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Cart icon bounce on add to cart. Smooth scrolling via lenis.

hero_banner.description: Sleek floating 3D composition of modern tech gadgets with electric blue accents.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons.
Implement the Layout and Spacing strictly. Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural marketing pages, and Shadcn for complex logic (Dropdowns, Tabs).
Ensure Dark Mode is properly supported via Tailwind 'dark:' utility classes. The base background should transition between #F8FAFC (light) and #1A1A2E (dark).
Implement Framer Motion for scroll effects, page transitions, and the AI chatbot toggle.
The Hero Section must use the provided hero_banner media URL with a gradient overlay to ensure text readability.
Do not use generic sans-serif fonts like 'Inter' for Headings. Use 'Outfit' or a similar expressive sans. Use 'Manrope' for body copy.
Build out the multi-step Checkout component with clear hierarchy, ensuring Mobile Money and Stripe options are visually distinct and clear.
In the Dashboard and Admin Panel, go cardless or use subtle borders, maximizing data density and utilizing chart libraries like Recharts.
